1.Title: Flawless Etiquette
1.Description: The equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by <color=#2BAD00>70</color>. When the equipper's <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> deals <color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</color>, the DMG dealt by their <color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</color> and <color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</color> increases by <color=#2BAD00>7%</color> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill use. At 2 stacks, all squad members gain <color=#2BAD00>60</color> Anomaly Proficiency. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.
